main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'fouling por antiespumante + cationic polymer' captura 2 de 3.

key_signals.justification: Conecta TS + hidrocarburos + TOC + depósito gel + cronología.

alternatives.justification: 3 alts (bio, hidrocarburos FOUL, cationic polymer) — cubre 3rd candidato.

recommended_action.justification: CIP dos pasos: cítrico + alcalino + 'do not exceed 40°C' + manufacturer guidelines.

requested_data.justification: Pide antiespumante concentration — single candidate trigger.

decision_change_condition.justification: Multi-condición: antiespumante <0.1 + ATP rising + TS low → biofouling.
